title: Monster texture variation is non-negotiable — the grid shows all 9 at once
body: After generating 5 characters, I realized they are all basically fuzzy round blobs with two eyes. The colors vary but the texture and silhouette are monotonous. When the bento grid shows all 9 simultaneously, this sameness will flatten the visual impact. Remaining monsters must use non-fuzzy textures — sleek, translucent, or amphibian.
decision: Remaining 2-3 monsters must use non-fuzzy textures.
alternatives_considered: Continue with fuzzy texture for consistency.
open_questions: Where is the line between variety and family cohesion?
